item.title: This is Peter Cvjetanovic a white nationalist
item.description: and he is upset that this photo of him has gone viral. So be nice: dont upvote this picture and let it hit fp until everyone sees it and don't share it everywhere on the internet
item.dc:creator: Ilovetomakestuffup

item.title: Telling my Mexican Mother I want to travel alone...
item.dc:creator: BenntheNinja

item.title: I'm back to brighten the Mjonday (I hope!) with the 263st eromeme album.
item.description:
I'm back, thanks for your patience. I'm trying to fix little parts of my life and sometimes I have to step back from one thing or another to get something done. Practice what I preach and all that. So without further ado, here's the stuff. No eromeme OC, as usual.
Quexk
Dr. Beeeeees! Ok, so. I didn't think about a message. Sometimes I don't. But I've been busy trying to do some things for me. And I'm gonna keep trying. And that's a big deal. It's hard to try something new, and hard to try something old that you didn't do right the first time. Basically anything out of your comfort zone is a real PITA to motivate for. But ya gotta do it if you're gonna get better. And ya gotta do better because you're worth being your best self. Anyway, heres the archive! May your way be Green and Golden. https://imgur.com/a/vhx2cjG
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.dc:creator: ShoemakerThe

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1194 (liking gap)
item.description:
Pippin let me sleep in for like two hours, holy crap. Anyway, let's get this bread.
I swing wildly between both of these.
I've learned that people do like me and being around me and I've decided to stop questioning it and trying to understand it and just go with it and enjoy it.
Oh thank God, these stones are gonna cure me and make me neurotypical. Who knew that it wasn't medications designed by scientists through science, and the cure to making me functional is gonna be... rocks.
It isn't what I need, what I need is money, but this would be nice.
Zooooooooooooom
Old news, but beautiful
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: [Satisfied Conure grunts while receiving scritches]
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Some DND memes to help me focus on not working
item.dc:creator: TheWonderfulWizardOfOs

item.title: What's that!? My birthday is on RHM!?? Costume pics! Costume pics for everyone!!!!
item.description:
The only technical selfie. BUT my friend Mallorie did my makeup and they deserve to be in this list of favorites!!!
Ending with cat tax. Like a good imgurian. Anyway, happy birthday me. You are so different than you were a year ago... wildly different than you were two years ago... phenomenally different than 3 years ago. I don't wish you stagnation, but I do wish you rest. You've done work. You've built community. Don't stop!!! But give yourself grace. You can rise more slowly now and enjoy the weirdo you've finally embraced. Love you!!! **Most viral edit!** The deal is, I always post the song I was listening to when I got the notification! So here it is! And thanks for being cool on ma birthday! https://open.spotify.com/track/77G0k1La0c5Dw8bAFANcyp?si=ENVSZYnuSs21tYIC3PyynA
item.dc:creator: AerinLovesCats

item.title: I'm scared
item.description: This is in the UK. Got busted with a lot of painkillers and other drugs in Nov 22. Got processed and released on bail. Had my bail extended 3 times then released on investigation. Since I was originally released on bail I have worked hard to better my self. I moved across the country to have a better environment. I got out of the toxic manual labour industry and got a job in finance. Rent my own place, I tried to get therapy but the NHS was so slow and private is so expensive. I had a interview with the police a month ago, I admitted to the stuff being mine and explained a little why. Personal use not distribution. 2 weeks ago I had a court date, I plead guilty obviously and the prosecution wants 2 years. The magistrate court didn't think they had the ability to provide a proper sentence so they past it to the crown. So here I am, just waiting. I keep going over my mitigating circumstances. First offence, Remorse, Good character references from 6 people, I was under 25, I have autism, ADHD and PTSD, I have taken steps to address my behaviour, I have breathing issues, I had a hard upbringing, I have great prospects at my job. I can take any other punishment, Curfew, fine, reporting to a probation officer, restricted movement even suspended sentence but not actual prison. No one knows the outcome and that scares me the most, the waiting. EDIT: I appreciate everyone telling me prison is not that bad and I'll get through it but that's not really helping. I have a fear of having my movements physically restricted after being sexually abused as a kid. I also barley got this finance job and I am scared that having this on my record and the gap in my CV will make it impossible to get back in. I worked so hard to rebuild my life and I can't have it taken away again.
item.dc:creator: thetinymonarch

item.title: A man and his best friend
item.dc:creator: Bacitying

item.title: Monday Mourning Cats
item.dc:creator: AgentOtter

item.title: You wanted to see it, but you hate seeing your child cry
item.description: In just shy of a year, my daughter ended it with her boyfriend. In July he started to be very distant and not calling her or wanting to talk very much. My daughter was upset and finally called him about it and things improved for a month. Then he did it again. She talked to him, he got better for a little bit, rinse and repeat. She gave her heart to him and they were both each other's first real relationships. But you can't string someone along like that. A red flag should have been that he didn't really talk to her mom and I when he came over. Always wanted to just go upstairs. I guess I'm just cut from a different cloth. So last night she finally had enough and broke it off. She was kind with her words, not attacking him. She wanted to call him and do it over the phone but he wasn't answering his phone so she did it over text which she was trying not to do. It's funny how suddenly he was available after that. But she is crying and upset. All I want is to hold her and tell her that it's all going to be okay but I know that's not going to fix anything. It's just hard feeling helpless knowing there is nothing I can do for her and that she will just need to grieve. I only hope that her next relationship is with someone who will love her the way she needs and is emotionally available for her.
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

item.title: Litterbox x Dungeon Flippers Crossover! [OC]
item.description: I'm a huge fan of the indie animated show Dungeon Flippers so I was honored for Travis to do this crossover comic! If you haven't seen it yet, here's episode 1 https://youtu.be/3NjbEw8khww?si=btNVdqAEYrDgM6Sd They have just 6 DAYS left on the Kickstarter for episode 2; lets goooooo!! https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/dungeonflippers/dungeon-flippers-episode-two-open-dungeon
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics
